tools.name: get_vault_stats
tools.description: Current on-chain metrics for SukukFi vaults on Berachain: capital held, pending deposits and redemptions, and participant counts. Refreshed from Berachain RPC.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Full-text search across public SukukFi writing: the documentation (how vaults work, obligor credit assessment, Islamic finance structuring, redemptions, risk, transparency) and the blog (explainers such as "is DeFi halal", "are stablecoins halal").

tools.name: get_doc
tools.description: Return a full SukukFi documentation page as markdown. Call search_docs first to find a slug, or pass a known slug such as "for-capital-providers/risk-considerations".

tools.name: get_contracts
tools.description: Verified SukukFi contract addresses on Berachain Mainnet with explorer links: the duPRT share token and the vault proxies for each accepted asset.

tools.name: get_vault_terms
tools.description: Deposit terms for the live SukukFi vault: target yield, capacity, minimum ticket, lockup, accepted assets and settlement cycle.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_vault_terms · Private data: get_vault_stats, get_contracts, get_vault_terms · Public sink: get_contracts.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_vault_terms · Private data: get_vault_stats, get_contracts, get_vault_terms · Public sink: get_contracts

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
